title: A Trinity
content:
Of three in One and One in three
    My narrow mind would doubting be
    Till Beauty, Grace and Kindness met
    And all at once were Juliet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Hilaire Belloc delivers a powerful performance in "A Trinity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
